sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n104148" key="tmhtosi/dhros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τμητοσίδηρος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῐ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n104148.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cut down with iron,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὕλη</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">14.19</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
